evals.prompt: Our /api/v2/search endpoint at https://httpbin.org/delay/2 is taking forever, can you figure out what's going on?
evals.expected_output: Should run httpstat with --format json, identify server processing as the dominant bottleneck (~2s), and explain that the delay is server-side, not network.

evals.prompt: I have this curl command: curl -X GET https://httpbin.org/get -H 'Accept: application/json' — can you show me where the time is being spent?
evals.expected_output: Should convert the curl command to httpstat, run it, break down timings by phase, and explain the results.

evals.prompt: Can you check if there's a noticeable TLS overhead when hitting https://www.google.com vs http://www.google.com?
evals.expected_output: Should run httpstat on both URLs, compare TLS timing, and quantify the overhead. Should note that http may redirect to https.
